programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Chester, treasure hunting with Jane and Paul.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Ocean-bound travelogue with presenter and singer Jane McDonald, featuring highlights of her cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: Auctioneers face a choice between a 19th-century apothecary cabinet and a plush chaise longue. Which piece do they think will get bidders most excited? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups start a game of building a "bigger-than-me-cake". Will the Mixmups find "another way" for Spin to see through his plan to eat the entire cake all by himself? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When the fairies wake up to find that their wands are not working, the kingdom has to cope without any help from magic for the entire day. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and wishing well she's got for the garden, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children are sad because their favourite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving Playgroup. But a leaving party will give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Tweedy discovers that music can really make you move and that Fluff... doesn't like that.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: After doing the 'Follow the Leader' dance with Fluff, Squiggle goes to play a fun game with Scratch and Badger, where they each in turn get to be the leader.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Sodor's oldest engine, Stephen worries about being able to keep pace with the younger engines, especially since Gordon must often slow down for him.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hannah shows off a homemade kite, her stunts cause a barbequing accident, sparking multiple fires.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's Award for Industry. Peppa and her friends are so excited, because they are going with her to the palace to meet the Queen.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: It's Father's Day but how will Toq let her dad know she's thinking of him all the way up in space? Maybe the Browns can help.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: The friends are forming a band and Posy gives out roles to everyone except Mo, who feels left out. She must figure out how to properly include him.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: ...Kitty Crew! While Ryder is away to fix Robo-Dog's tail, Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his barking kitties.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Present. It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig takes Peppa to the doctors for her yearly health check up with Dr Polar Bear, who checks her height, weight, ears, mouth and heartbeat and more.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: With the building work complete, it's time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. It's dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Join Tim Rex as he tackles kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions... in space! Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: A fish has gone missing from Grandad's pond and his plastic 'scare' heron appears to have come to life! Stan and Gran suspect something fishy is going on.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A rockslide leaves Goodway, Farmer Yumi and Garby stranded on a mountain.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark offer to write Commander Cottontail's biography, following him through the jungle on an exciting expedition. But then they lose him..

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When the fairy kingdom is left without food because there is nothing left in the treasure chest to pay the elves, King Thistle has to find a job.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in Grandpa Pig's garden. Peppa pretends to be a butterfly.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: After reading his comic book about a super bird, Odo spends the day wearing a cape and rescuing those in need.

programme.title: Milkshake! Make a Change
programme.desc: Derek learns how different kinds of weather make up our climate. At a Forest School, children paint using pineapples, and also pretend to be the wind, rain and sunshine.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Jen tells a story in which Noah brings his favourite storybook to school - but all the characters escape, causing havoc! Will Noah be able to catch them all and read his book to class.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Bored author Richard Castle teams up with New York detective Kate Beckett when she recognises a murder scene from one of his novels.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate when the body of a young nanny is found in the clothes dryer of the apartment building where she worked.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: A story of nature helping itself in the context of climate change, with cattle rather than humans shaping the environment, resulting in benefits for both cattle and farm alike.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: On a wet farm in mid-Wales, we meet shepherd Joel and his two highly intelligent and skilled Border Collies Nessie and Joe who are busily rounding up sheep.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.sub-title: In Kent, Susan visits Hever Castle, the childhood home of Anne Boleyn; Canterbury Cathedral, the premier place for a medieval pilgrimage; and Penshurst, where she tries fencing

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Interceptors Gav and Neil pursue a pair of vehicles believed to have been involved in a raid on a car hire firm. Rob and Spence deal with a man hellbent on spitting at them.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: PC Ed Clarke responds to a 999 call from a worried driver who's behind a van that's all over the road and almost collided with the central reservation.

programme.title: Egypt with Dan Snow
programme.desc: Dan Snow goes on an epic historical journey through Egypt - from glorious Luxor to a luxury steamer on the Nile, and the ancient pyramids to the packed streets of Cairo.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: Roads policing officer PC Merchant pursues a stolen car that is being driven dangerously. And a drunk female on a night out takes her chance to pinch a policeman's bottom.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Dealing with drug users and dealers is a daily challenge for cops. A driver, suspected of being under the influence of drugs, tries to evade capture, including ramming a police car.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: It's a tale of two pursuits, as the Interceptors chase down two separate runaways using wildly different tactics.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Jessica Wall are in Leeds, treasure hunting with David and Sandra.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Prestatyn, treasure hunting with Diane.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Leeds, treasure hunting with Jo and David.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: Locals bring collectibles to a valuation day in Stourbridge. Will either auctioneer be tempted by locally-blown wine goblets or a Basil Brush lamp base? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups set out on an adventure to be parcel delivery drivers and help the LLB online store owner, but they soon find themselves with a heap of muddled up mail. (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King and Queen Thistle ask Nanny Plum and the Wise Old Elf to build a boat capable of beating the Marigolds. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When a fishing trip goes wrong, leaving Grandpa Pig and Grampy Rabbit stranded on a desert island, Captain Daddy Dog is the only one able to save them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: After smelling Granny Pig's perfume de lavender, Peppa experiments with the flowers in the garden to create her own special smell.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: When Fluff isn't interested in his surprise birthday treat, Tweedy learns that there is such a thing as too many crunchies for the usually hungry Fluff.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: When Nok-Nok finds a fallen star, Squiggle visits Magnus at the top of the tree to see if he can help put the star back in the sky.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines
programme.desc: The engines attempt to settle a bet regarding the optimal number of wheels an engine needs by taking the duke and duchess to Callan Castle.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James plans a cafe makeover for the Wholefish Cafe, he becomes over-zealous, leading to a series of events that cause a fire.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The school roof has a leak again, so the children organise a fete to raise money for a new roof.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: ...Musketeers. For World Book Day, Paddington helps Mateo dress up as his favourite character.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy try to stay up late for a midnight snack.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot loses his glasses and creates chaos in his wake, it's up to the Paw Patrol to save him and his specs.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Track. Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, Peppa and George go to the Skate Park with their bicycles, scooters and skateboards. Peppa has fun playing around on Daddy's skateboard.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Zebra arrives with a new car seat for the baby! Excited to try it in the car, the family soon realise it won't fit with Peppa and George too. It's time for a new car.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Grandad's gnomes go missing. The mystery deepens when Stan finds a tiny human handprint! The gnomes can't really have come to life, can they?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Humdinger winds up on a runaway wagon with Mayor Goodway.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark become ambulance drivers and soon realise that driving fast is not right for all patients. But then Tania needs to get to the hospital to have her baby..

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After Strawberry shows off her well-trained new pet, Gaston is sent to pet school where Miss Jolly soon gets him into shape.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George love dressing up, so one day they creep into Mummy and Daddy's room and dress up in their clothes.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Odo follows Scuttle, his beetle pal and accidentally gets locked in Camp Leader's hut with Rosie and Flo. Odo keeps their spirits up using a ping pong ball and a tin of peaches.

programme.title: Milkshake! Make a Change
programme.desc: Milkshake! presenter Derek learns about gardening and discovers how trees, vegetables, flowers and plants all grow from seeds. At a Forest School, children plant seeds to grow carrots.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Kiera tells a story about Otis the new puppy! Otis is determined to be a good boy and always be ready to lend a paw. But no matter how hard he tries; he just can't stay out of trouble.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett uncover a story of betrayal and obsession while looking into the death of a teenage boy found in Central Park.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: When a city councillor is found wrapped in a rug, Beckett and Castle investigate whether his death was connected to his political life.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Flora Beverley, the Founder of the Pollinator Pathways Project in Bristol, is transforming the city's alleyways by encouraging the local community with pollinator-friendly planting.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: This film is about the work of a field officer for Whale and Dolphin Conservation in the Moray Firth. They're ocean advocates for the need to protect the species we have.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Susan celebrates the weird and wonderful ways she's travelled on land and sea, from river rapids by rubber ring to sea tractors on the Devon Coast.

programme.title: Springtime on the Farm
programme.desc: Farmers Rob and Dave Nicholson are joined by Helen Skelton, Jules Hudson and JB Gill for the busiest time of the year at Cannon Hall Farm, with lambing in full swing.

programme.title: Sam & Ade Go Birding
programme.desc: On the north Norfolk coast, Samuel West and Adrian Edmondson set off on a 'wild goose chase' that leads them through pine forests, across sweeping beaches and onto the marshes.

programme.title: Egypt with Dan Snow
programme.desc: Dan heads to the beautiful city of Aswan aboard the SS Sudan, before visiting the temples of Philae and Abu Simbel, tasting Nubian cuisine and trying to buy a camel.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Transport for London investigators Rich and Greg are on the trail of a man they believe has run up over £1500 in unpaid fares in east London on the Elizabeth Line.

programme.title: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up
programme.desc: Following the work of enforcement agents as they execute High Court Writs. In Worthing, agents visit a swimming pool installation business to recover money for a customer.

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Video and first-hand testimony from police on the front line. In North Wales, officers head to a car park, where a large group of youngsters appear to be drunk and arguing.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser David Fergus are in Oxford, treasure hunting with Susan. Retired university lecturer Susan has lived all over the world.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Reading, treasure hunting with Gary and Sarah.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross, Chandler, Joey and Monica go to London for Ross's wedding. Rachel realises that she is still in love with Ross and races to join them.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel frantically tries to get to London before Ross marries Emily. Ross's parents clash with Emily's.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: In the showdown auction, Paul and Rachel get ready for the final battle of the week. Who will be crowned champion of the West Midlands? (VS).
